code.parse_mode_reason: Requested 2D physics subset pass; 3D lifting is forbidden for this run.

readme_task_contract.summary: Instructional Plinko video for the forward task: follow the dropped marble to learn where it lands.

attached_instructions.text:
Plinko Machine

You will now see a few videos that show you how the Plinko Machine works. Click the play button to see the ball being dropped into the Plinko Machine.

config_metadata.description: Participants see the initial ball drop location in a Plinko box and place 10 responses on a normalized 0-100 horizontal axis to indicate where they think the ball will land.
